commit.subject: LU-14288 nodemap: debug IPv6 failures
commit.message:
LU-14288 nodemap: debug IPv6 failures

Track kernel crashes.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec env=FORCE_LARGE_NID=true,LOAD_MODULES_REMOTE=true
Change-Id: I26b2250340c7e223913d769c8805968a4da15295
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
